query:
SELECT 'bills_of_lading' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM bills_of_lading
UNION ALL SELECT 'customers', COUNT(*) FROM customers
UNION ALL SELECT 'vehicles', COUNT(*) FROM vehicles
UNION ALL SELECT 'bl_vehicles', COUNT(*) FROM bl_vehicles
UNION ALL SELECT 'tracking_codes', COUNT(*) FROM tracking_codes
UNION ALL SELECT 'tracking_history', COUNT(*) FROM tracking_history
UNION ALL SELECT 'processed_emails', COUNT(*) FROM processed_emails
UNION ALL SELECT 'audit_log', COUNT(*) FROM audit_log;
